name: auto-refresh: when invoked via /doctor --watch, also triggers L-22 (PR corpus) and C-19 (compliance) auto-refresh in parallel (per H-7)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --watch --tick-once --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --emit-runs "$PWD/runs.txt" && grep "S-17" runs.txt 1>&2 && grep "L-22" runs.txt 1>&2 && grep "C-19" runs.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
